csharp.primaryUse: .NET projects that prefer xUnit/NUnit and Microsoft Playwright
csharp.reuseMode: portable testcase JSON plus bridge process until native ZeuZ action wrappers exist

java.primaryUse: enterprise API/mobile/web projects that prefer JVM tests
java.reuseMode: portable testcase JSON plus bridge process until native ZeuZ action wrappers exist

javascript.primaryUse: Playwright-first web tests with portable testcase export/import
javascript.reuseMode: native Playwright plus Python ZeuZ bridge subprocess for DB/mobile/desktop actions

python.primaryUse: native bridge, pytest suites, direct ZeuZ Node function reuse when configured
python.reuseMode: import-or-subprocess ZeuZ_Python_Node plus portable testcase JSON

typescript.primaryUse: Playwright-first web tests with portable testcase export/import
typescript.reuseMode: native Playwright plus Python ZeuZ bridge subprocess for DB/mobile/desktop actions

recommendedStrategy: Use native Playwright for local web execution.
Use ZeuZ-derived action wrappers for mobile, desktop, DB, REST, performance, security, XML, and common actions.
For non-Python test suites, call the Python ZeuZ bridge through a local CLI/subprocess until native wrappers are available.
Always emit zkme.zeuz-compatible-report.v1 with zeuzExecutionLog when a flow is ZeuZ-compatible.
